regex: RenderFlex overflowed by .* pixels on the (right|bottom|left|top)
title: Flutter RenderFlex overflow
fixes: Wrap overflowing widget in Expanded or Flexible
Use SingleChildScrollView for scrollable content
Add overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis for Text widgets

title: Flutter setState called after widget dispose
fixes: Check 'if (mounted)' before calling setState()
Cancel async operations in dispose() method
Use a flag or CancelableOperation to track widget lifecycle

regex: MissingPluginException.*No implementation found for method.*on channel
title: Flutter platform channel method not implemented
fixes: Ensure native plugin is registered in MainActivity/AppDelegate
Run 'flutter clean' and rebuild the app
Check plugin version compatibility with Flutter version

title: Flutter Riverpod/Provider not found in widget tree
fixes: Wrap the widget tree with ProviderScope at the top
Ensure ConsumerWidget or HookConsumerWidget is used correctly
Check that the provider is accessible from the widget's location in tree

title: Flutter GoRouter route not found
fixes: Check route path matches exactly (including leading slash)
Ensure the route is defined in GoRouter configuration
Use errorBuilder to handle unknown routes gracefully

title: Flutter build_runner output conflict
fixes: Run 'dart run build_runner clean' then 'dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs'
Check for duplicate generators targeting the same file
Ensure part/part of directives are correct in generated files

regex: A RenderFlex overflowed.*This error happens when.*Expanded.*Flexible
title: Flutter Flex layout constraint error
fixes: Use Expanded to fill available space in Row/Column
Set mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min on Row/Column
Wrap content in ConstrainedBox or SizedBox for explicit sizing

regex: LateInitializationError: Field '.*' has not been initialized
title: Flutter late field not initialized
fixes: Initialize the field before accessing it
Use nullable type with null check instead of late
Move initialization to initState() for widgets

regex: type 'Null' is not a subtype of type '.*' in type cast
title: Flutter null cast to non-nullable type
fixes: Use 'as Type?' for nullable casts then null check
Ensure the value is not null before casting
Use pattern matching: if (value case Type v) { ... }

title: Flutter PlatformException from native code
fixes: Check platform-specific error code and message for details
Verify native permissions are granted (camera, location, etc.)
Handle PlatformException with try/catch in the calling code

regex: StateError.*Cannot emit new states after calling close
title: Flutter Bloc/Cubit emit after close
fixes: Check isClosed before emitting new states
Cancel subscriptions and timers in close() method
Use StreamSubscription.cancel() in Bloc close()

title: Flutter Riverpod StateNotifier used after disposal
fixes: Check mounted property before state updates
Don't store references to notifiers outside provider scope
Use ref.onDispose() to clean up async operations

title: Flutter GoRouter infinite redirect loop
fixes: Add base case to redirect logic: return null to stop redirecting
Check redirect doesn't redirect to a path that also redirects
Use state.location to avoid redirecting to the current location

title: Flutter number parsing format exception
fixes: Use int.tryParse() or double.tryParse() which return null on failure
Validate string input before parsing
Trim whitespace from string before parsing: str.trim()

regex: Exception.*type '.*' is not a subtype of type '.*' of 'function result'
title: Flutter function return type mismatch
fixes: Check the function's return type annotation matches actual return
Ensure generic type parameters are correct
Use explicit casting or convert the value to expected type

title: React Native TurboModule not found
fixes: Ensure the native module is registered in the TurboModuleProvider
Run pod install (iOS) or gradle sync (Android) after adding module
Check the module spec name matches the native registration name

title: React Native Fabric component not registered
fixes: Register component in the ComponentDescriptorProvider for Fabric
Ensure native component uses the new Fabric renderer API
Check that codegen generated the necessary interface files

title: React Native module resolution failure
fixes: Clear Metro bundler cache: npx react-native start --reset-cache
Delete node_modules and run npm install/yarn again
Check package.json doesn't have conflicting versions of the module

title: React Native native component not linked
fixes: Run 'npx react-native link' or rebuild native project
For iOS: cd ios && pod install && rebuild
Verify the native component is exported in the correct module

title: React Native Hermes bytecode version mismatch
fixes: Clean build: cd android && ./gradlew clean
Delete build caches and Metro cache, rebuild from scratch
Ensure Hermes engine version matches React Native version

title: React Native bridge not available with New Architecture
fixes: Migrate module from bridge to TurboModules/Fabric API
Use interop layer: RCTTurboModule bridging for gradual migration
Check newArchEnabled flag in gradle.properties/Podfile

title: SwiftUI preview crash
fixes: Clean build folder: Cmd+Shift+K, then rebuild
Check for force-unwrapped optionals or fatalError in preview code
Provide mock data in #Preview macro instead of live dependencies

title: Swift Combine publisher cancelled unexpectedly
fixes: Store the AnyCancellable in a Set to prevent premature deallocation
Use .store(in: &cancellables) to retain the subscription
Check if the publisher's upstream was deallocated

title: Core Data model incompatible with persistent store
fixes: Add a migration mapping model for schema changes
Use lightweight migration: addPersistentStore with NSMigratePersistentStoresAutomaticallyOption
Delete and recreate the store in development (loses data)

title: App Store Connect binary contains simulator architecture
fixes: Ensure build is for 'Any iOS Device', not simulator
Strip simulator architectures from frameworks in build phase
Use XCFramework format which separates architectures properly

title: Jetpack Compose vertical scroll with infinite constraints
fixes: Don't nest vertically scrollable components (LazyColumn in Column with scroll)
Use height(IntrinsicSize.Min) or explicit height modifier
Replace inner scrollable with items {} in the outer LazyColumn

title: Android Hilt injection not performed
fixes: Annotate Activity/Fragment with @AndroidEntryPoint
Ensure Application class has @HiltAndroidApp annotation
Check that Hilt Gradle plugin is applied: id 'dagger.hilt.android.plugin'

title: Android Room migration incomplete
fixes: Ensure migration SQL covers all schema changes between versions
Use autoMigrations in @Database annotation for simple changes
Export schema for validation: exportSchema = true in @Database

title: Android R8/ProGuard missing class after obfuscation
fixes: Add -keep rule in proguard-rules.pro for the missing class
Add -dontwarn for expected missing classes (e.g., optional dependencies)
Use @Keep annotation on classes that shouldn't be removed/obfuscated

title: Flutter Dio connection refused
fixes: Check server is running and accessible from device
For Android emulator, use 10.0.2.2 instead of localhost
Verify network permissions in AndroidManifest/Info.plist

title: Flutter Freezed JSON generation failure
fixes: Add @JsonSerializable() annotation on the Freezed class
Ensure json_serializable is in dev_dependencies
Run build_runner with --delete-conflicting-outputs

title: Flutter Android multidex/dex error
fixes: Enable multidex: multiDexEnabled true in app/build.gradle
Update minSdkVersion to 21+ which has built-in multidex
Run flutter clean and rebuild

title: Flutter iOS pod platform version incompatible
fixes: Set platform :ios, '13.0' (or higher) in ios/Podfile
Update IPHONEOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET in Xcode project
Run 'cd ios && pod update' to resolve version conflicts

title: React Native NativeModules property null
fixes: Rebuild native project after adding new native module
Check native module is exported correctly in native code
Verify auto-linking worked: npx react-native config

title: React Native Watchman crawl failure
fixes: Restart Watchman: watchman shutdown-server && watchman
Delete watchman state: watchman watch-del-all
Increase inotify watchers: echo 65536 | sudo tee /proc/sys/fs/inotify/max_user_watches

title: React Native codegen spec validation error
fixes: Ensure TypeScript types in spec file match codegen requirements
Use supported codegen types: string, number, boolean, Object
Check spec file naming: Native<ModuleName>.ts/js

title: SwiftUI AttributeGraph cycle causing infinite loop
fixes: Remove circular dependency between @State and body computation
Don't modify state during view body evaluation
Use .task{} or .onAppear{} for side effects instead of computed properties

regex: Swift.*Publishing changes from background threads is not allowed
title: SwiftUI state update from background thread
fixes: Wrap state update in DispatchQueue.main.async or MainActor
Add @MainActor annotation to the ObservableObject class
Use .receive(on: RunLoop.main) in Combine pipeline before sink

title: Core Data merge conflict between contexts
fixes: Set mergePolicy on the managed object context: NSMergeByPropertyObjectTrumpMergePolicy
Use NSPersistentContainer's automatic merge configuration
Refresh the object: context.refresh(object, mergeChanges: true)

title: App Store Connect UIWebView deprecation rejection
fixes: Replace all UIWebView usage with WKWebView
Check third-party libraries for UIWebView references
Search binary with: grep -r UIWebView in .app bundle

title: Jetpack Compose CompositionLocal not provided
fixes: Wrap composable tree with CompositionLocalProvider
Provide the CompositionLocal value above the composable that reads it
Add defaultFactory to staticCompositionLocalOf for fallback

title: Android Hilt ViewModel missing @Inject constructor
fixes: Add @Inject constructor() to the ViewModel class
Annotate ViewModel with @HiltViewModel
Ensure all ViewModel dependencies can be provided by Hilt

title: Android Room cursor window full (row too large)
fixes: Limit query result columns to only those needed
Store large BLOBs externally and keep references in Room
Paginate results with Paging 3 library

title: Android ProGuard can't find referenced constructor
fixes: Add -keep class rule for the class with missing constructor
Use @Keep annotation on classes instantiated via reflection
Add -keepclassmembers rule for specific constructors

title: Flutter RangeError index on empty collection
fixes: Check collection.isNotEmpty before accessing by index
Use collection.firstOrNull (Dart 3) instead of collection.first
Add bounds checking: if (index < list.length) list[index]

regex: Flutter.*Error:.*The getter '.*' was called on null
title: Flutter null pointer member access
fixes: Use null-aware operator: object?.property
Add null check before access: if (object != null)
Use late keyword only when guaranteed to be initialized before access

regex: react-native.*Error:.*flipper.*Could not connect to the Flipper server
title: React Native Flipper connection failure
fixes: Ensure Flipper desktop app is running on the same machine
Check Flipper port isn't blocked: default 9088/9089
Remove Flipper if not needed (improves build time significantly)

title: React Native Animated value attached to multiple views
fixes: Create separate Animated.Value instances for each view
Use useRef to ensure animated values aren't shared across renders
Reset animated value when view unmounts

regex: SwiftUI.*Modifying state during view update.*this will cause undefined behavior
title: SwiftUI state modification during view update
fixes: Defer state changes to .onAppear{} or .task{}
Use DispatchQueue.main.async to break the update cycle
Move state logic to ViewModel and use Combine for async updates

title: Jetpack Compose LazyColumn duplicate key
fixes: Ensure key parameter in items() produces unique values for each item
Use item.id or unique identifier as key, not index
Check data source for duplicate entries

title: Flutter iterable operation on empty collection
fixes: Use firstOrNull/lastOrNull instead of first/last
Check iterable.isNotEmpty before accessing elements
Use firstWhere with orElse parameter for safe lookup

regex: Flutter.*Error:.*Cannot hit test a render box.*needs.*layout
title: Flutter hit test on widget not yet laid out
fixes: Ensure widget has completed layout before gesture detection
Use WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback for post-layout logic
Check if RenderBox hasSize before performing hit test

title: Flutter ObjectBox schema migration error
fixes: Increment the model version and provide migration steps
For development, delete the database and start fresh
Use objectbox_model.json to track schema changes properly

title: Flutter network image connection closed
fixes: Add errorBuilder to Image.network for graceful fallback
Use CachedNetworkImage package for retry and caching
Check network connectivity before loading images

title: Flutter Riverpod ProviderScope disposed error
fixes: Don't access providers after ProviderScope widget is unmounted
Use ref.read instead of ref.watch for fire-and-forget operations
Ensure ProviderScope is at the root and never rebuilt

title: Flutter GoRouter child route path assertion
fixes: Child route paths should NOT start with '/' (they're relative)
Use path: 'details' not path: '/details' in sub-routes
Full path is parent + child: '/home' + 'details' = '/home/details'

title: Flutter build_runner invalid source for generation
fixes: Check annotations are correctly applied to eligible targets
Ensure the generator supports the target element type (class, function, etc.)
Update the code generation package to latest version

title: React Native NativeModule is null
fixes: Rebuild the native app after adding the module (not just JS bundle)
Check native module is properly linked in MainApplication/AppDelegate
For New Architecture: ensure module conforms to TurboModule spec

title: React Native Codegen compatibility error
fixes: Ensure react-native version matches codegen expectations
Update @react-native/codegen to compatible version
Clean generated files and regenerate: cd android && ./gradlew clean

title: React Native Fabric ShadowNode missing
fixes: Ensure component is compatible with Fabric renderer
Check for race conditions between JS and native view lifecycle
Rebuild native app after enabling New Architecture

title: React Native Hermes bytecode internal error
fixes: Clear Hermes cache: delete android/app/build/generated/source/hermes
Update Hermes version by upgrading React Native
Disable Hermes temporarily to verify it's the cause: hermes_enabled = false

regex: SwiftUI.*The compiler is unable to type-check this expression in reasonable time
title: SwiftUI complex expression type-check timeout
fixes: Break complex view body into smaller extracted subviews
Add explicit type annotations to ambiguous expressions
Use @ViewBuilder for conditional logic instead of ternary operators

regex: Swift.*Combine.*receive.*was already called on this subscriber
title: Swift Combine subscriber received duplicate subscription
fixes: Ensure each subscriber only subscribes once
Cancel previous subscription before creating new one
Use .handleEvents(receiveSubscription:) to debug subscription flow

title: Core Data unique constraint conflict
fixes: Set merge policy: context.mergePolicy = NSMergeByPropertyObjectTrumpMergePolicy
Check for existing records before inserting
Use batch operations with conflict resolution

title: TestFlight missing Swift module in archive
fixes: Set ALWAYS_EMBED_SWIFT_STANDARD_LIBRARIES = YES in build settings
Ensure the framework includes the swiftmodule directory
Rebuild with the correct Xcode version for Swift compatibility

title: Jetpack Compose unnecessary recomposition from unstable params
fixes: Mark data classes as @Stable or @Immutable
Use remember{} to stabilize lambda parameters
Avoid passing mutable collections - use kotlinx.collections.immutable

title: Android Hilt missing binding for dependency
fixes: Create @Module with @Provides function for the type
Or annotate the class with @Inject constructor for automatic binding
Use @Binds for interface-to-implementation binding in abstract module

regex: Android.*Room.*error:.*Cannot figure out how to save this field into database
title: Android Room unsupported field type
fixes: Add @TypeConverter for the unsupported type
Register TypeConverters in @Database(typeConverters = [...])
Use @Embedded for nested data classes instead of custom types

title: Android class not found after R8 minification
fixes: Add -keep rule for classes used via reflection
Use @Keep annotation on the class
Check if a library needs specific ProGuard rules (consult documentation)

title: Flutter Google Sign-In API exception
fixes: Verify SHA-1/SHA-256 fingerprint in Firebase console matches debug/release key
Ensure google-services.json is up to date
Check OAuth 2.0 client ID configuration in Google Cloud Console

title: Flutter MediaQuery not available in widget tree
fixes: Ensure widget is below MaterialApp/CupertinoApp in the tree
Wrap test widgets in MediaQuery for unit tests
Use LayoutBuilder instead for responsive layout without MediaQuery

title: Flutter Firebase not initialized
fixes: Call await Firebase.initializeApp() in main() before runApp()
Ensure WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized() is called first
Check firebase_options.dart is generated with FlutterFire CLI

title: React Native VirtualizedList nested in ScrollView
fixes: Use FlatList/SectionList's ListHeaderComponent/ListFooterComponent
Replace outer ScrollView with a single FlatList using renderItem
Use nestedScrollEnabled={true} on Android as last resort

regex: react-native.*Error:.*You attempted to set the key.*on an object that is meant to be immutable
title: React Native immutable object modification attempt
fixes: Spread the object to create a mutable copy: {...obj, key: newValue}
Don't mutate props or state directly
Use immer or structuredClone for deep modifications

regex: react-native.*AsyncStorage.*Could not get value.*database or disk is full
title: React Native AsyncStorage storage full
fixes: Clear unused AsyncStorage keys: AsyncStorage.removeItem('key')
Use MMKV or WatermelonDB for larger datasets
Implement data expiry/cleanup in the app

title: SwiftUI NavigationPath type not Codable
fixes: Ensure all types pushed to NavigationPath conform to Hashable and Codable
Use .navigationDestination(for: Type.self) for each pushable type
Register all navigable types before pushing to path

title: Swift actor isolation violation
fixes: Mark the calling function as async and use await for actor calls
Use nonisolated keyword if the property doesn't need isolation
Use MainActor.run {} to switch to appropriate actor context

title: Core Data iCloud sync store not reachable
fixes: Check CloudKit container is properly configured in capabilities
Verify iCloud account is signed in on device
Use NSPersistentCloudKitContainer and check mirror status

title: App Store Connect bitcode configuration mismatch
fixes: Apple no longer requires bitcode (Xcode 14+) - set ENABLE_BITCODE=NO
Rebuild all libraries without bitcode
Update third-party SDKs that still require bitcode

title: Jetpack Compose ClassCast in composable singletons
fixes: Clean and rebuild the project: ./gradlew clean assembleDebug
Check for Compose compiler version mismatch with Kotlin version
Update Compose BOM to align all Compose library versions

title: Android Hilt WorkManager Worker injection failure
fixes: Use @HiltWorker annotation on the Worker class
Add @AssistedInject constructor with @Assisted for context and workerParams
Initialize HiltWorkerFactory in Application and set as WorkManager factory

title: Android Room missing migration between versions
fixes: Add Migration(oldVersion, newVersion) to database builder
Use fallbackToDestructiveMigration() for development only
Implement all intermediate migrations: v1->v2->v3, not just v1->v3

title: Android R8 method too large after optimization
fixes: Split large methods into smaller ones
Disable specific R8 optimizations: -dontoptimize for problematic class
Check generated code (data binding, navigation) isn't too complex

title: Flutter Completer completed more than once
fixes: Check completer.isCompleted before calling complete()
Use a Completer only once - create new instance for each operation
Guard with try/catch or status flag to prevent double completion

regex: Flutter.*error:.*looking up a deactivated widget's ancestor
title: Flutter accessing ancestor of deactivated widget
fixes: Don't access context in callbacks that fire after widget disposal
Cache needed values from context before async operations
Use mounted check before using BuildContext in callbacks

title: Flutter Riverpod ref used after provider disposed
fixes: Use ref.onDispose() to cancel timers and subscriptions
Don't capture ref in closures that outlive the provider
Use ref.keepAlive() if provider should persist

title: React Native Metro bundler cache corruption
fixes: Clear Metro cache: npx react-native start --reset-cache
Delete node_modules/.cache and temp directories
Kill all Metro processes and restart fresh

title: React Native native module not linked properly
fixes: Run 'npx pod-install' for iOS, './gradlew clean' for Android
Check react-native.config.js for auto-linking configuration
Manually link if auto-linking fails: add to Podfile/settings.gradle

title: SwiftUI environment object not provided
fixes: Pass .environmentObject(myObject) higher in the view hierarchy
Ensure the object type matches: @EnvironmentObject var obj: MyType
For previews, provide mock environment objects

title: Swift non-Sendable type in concurrent context
fixes: Make the type conform to Sendable protocol
Use @unchecked Sendable if you can guarantee thread safety
Restructure code to not capture non-Sendable values across concurrency boundaries

regex: Core Data.*Could not cast value of type.*NSManagedObject.*to
title: Core Data entity class casting failure
fixes: Set Class name in .xcdatamodeld entity inspector
Ensure Module is set to 'Current Product Module'
Verify entity class is generated/matches the model definition

regex: App Store Connect.*ITMS-90190.*invalid bundle.*contains disallowed file 'Frameworks'
title: App Store Connect nested frameworks not allowed
fixes: Don't embed frameworks inside other frameworks
Use static libraries/XCFrameworks instead of dynamic nested frameworks
Check build settings: ALWAYS_EMBED_SWIFT_STANDARD_LIBRARIES in framework target

title: Jetpack Compose function called from non-composable context
fixes: Annotate the calling function with @Composable
Move composable call inside a proper composable scope
Use LaunchedEffect/SideEffect for non-composable operations in composables

title: Android Hilt EntryPoint usage error
fixes: Use EntryPointAccessors.fromApplication(context, MyEntryPoint::class.java)
Ensure @EntryPoint interface is annotated with @InstallIn(SingletonComponent::class)
Don't use EntryPoints directly in @HiltAndroidApp class - use @Inject instead

title: Android Room DAO method missing annotation
fixes: Add @Query, @Insert, @Update, or @Delete annotation to DAO methods
Ensure method return type matches the annotation (Insert returns Long/void)
Use @RawQuery for dynamic query building

title: Android AbstractMethodError after R8 obfuscation
fixes: Add -keep rules for interfaces implemented via generics
Use -keepclassmembers for overridden abstract methods
Check if Kotlin interface default methods need keepclassmembers rule

regex: Flutter.*Error:.*Scaffold\.of\(\) called with.*context.*does not contain a Scaffold
title: Flutter Scaffold.of() context doesn't contain Scaffold
fixes: Use ScaffoldMessenger.of(context) for snackbars (Flutter 2.0+)
Wrap in Builder widget to get a context below the Scaffold
Use GlobalKey<ScaffoldState> for direct scaffold access

title: React Native headless task not registered
fixes: Register task in index.js: AppRegistry.registerHeadlessTask('TaskName', () => task)
Ensure task name matches between native and JS registration
Task must be registered before the native module triggers it

title: SwiftUI EXC_BAD_ACCESS from deallocated ObservableObject
fixes: Hold a strong reference to the ObservableObject in the view hierarchy
Use @StateObject (not @ObservedObject) for objects the view owns
Ensure object isn't deallocated while async work references it

title: Jetpack Compose RecyclerView interop crash with LazyColumn
fixes: Use pure Compose LazyColumn instead of RecyclerView interop
If interop is needed, use AndroidView with proper lifecycle handling
Set nestedScrollConnection for proper scroll coordination
